changeSet.author: juliwolf
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_unique_relation_attribute_relation_attribute_t_deleted_flag ON "relation_attribute" (relation_id, attribute_type_id, deleted_flag) WHERE deleted_flag = false;

changeSet.author: juliwolf
changeSet.sql: insert into entity (entity_id, entity_name, deleted_flag) values ('85ba86eb-f55d-4635-aae7-7db72a6a29f1', 'RELATION_ATTRIBUTE', false) ON CONFLICT DO nothing;

changeSet.author: juliwolf
